en: Why do we say big blue sea not blue big sea If you want to sound natural in
ko: 왜 big blue sea라고 하지 blue big sea가 아니라? 자연스러운 영어를 원하면

en: English learn adjective order First opinion What do you think about it Beautiful
ko: 형용사 순서를 배워. 첫 번째, 의견. 어떻게 생각해? Beautiful,

en: ugly fantastic Two size Big small tiny Three
ko: ugly, fantastic. 둘, 크기. Big, small, tiny. 셋,

en: age Old new ancient Four shape
ko: 나이. Old, new, ancient. 넷, 모양.

en: Round square rectangular Five colour Red blue green
ko: Round, square, rectangular. 다섯, 색깔. Red, blue, green.

en: Six origin Italian Japanese Mexican Seven
ko: 여섯, 출신. Italian, Japanese, Mexican. 일곱,

en: material Wood metal plastic And eight purpose
ko: 재료. Wood, metal, plastic. 여덟, 용도.

en: sleeping writing Should we put it together Okay my mum loves her beautiful small old
ko: sleeping, writing. 다 합쳐볼까? 우리 엄마는 아름답고 작고 오래된

en: round brown Italian wooden cooking spoon
ko: 둥글고 갈색의 이탈리아제 나무 요리 숟가락을 좋아해.

en: Now we wouldn't use so many adjectives but try to make a sentence in the right order in the comments
ko: 이렇게 많은 형용사를 쓰진 않겠지만 올바른 순서로 문장을 만들어봐.
